examples: Gangrene set in and he had to have his leg amputated.
Once gangrene has developed, the tissue is dead, and the only hope is to contain the damage.
The wound is festering, and gangrene has set in.
This eventually damages or destroys skin tissues and may lead to infection and gangrene.
He has faced starvation, suffered frostbite in his fingers and gangrene in his foot.
